code: import{balancedPointsEnum}from'../Models';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const calculateBPandTP=(goal,criteriaGoals,relation,pointsToDistribution)=>{/* Calculate balancedPoints */let totalPoints=0;let balancedPoints={type:balancedPointsEnum.WEIGHT,value:0,postFix:'%'};for(const criteriaGoal of criteriaGoals){if(relation.balance){if(relation.method===balancedPointsEnum.WEIGHT){balancedPoints.value+=+(goal.distributedPoints[criteriaGoal.id]*criteriaGoal.balancedPoints.value/100).toFixed(2);}else{balancedPoints.value+=+(goal.distributedPoints[criteriaGoal.id]*(criteriaGoal.balancedPoints.value/relation.total)).toFixed(2);}}totalPoints+=goal.distributedPoints[criteriaGoal.id];}if(!relation.balance){balancedPoints.value=+(totalPoints/(pointsToDistribution*criteriaGoals.length)*100).toFixed(2);}return{tp:totalPoints,bp:balancedPoints};};export const HideScrollBar=_ref=>{let{scrollRef,style,onScroll,children}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"hideScrollBar",style:style,ref:scrollRef,onScroll:onScroll,children:children});};
